intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“比较结构 -> 商店侦探观察 -> 包好裙子 -> 没付钱离开 -> 女儿反转”的侦探链读顺。

sentences.text: People are not so honest as they once were.
sentences.focus_zh: not so... as 是比较结构；once were 要读成“以前是那样”的回看。

sentences.text: The temptation to steal is greater than ever before -- especially in large shops.
sentences.focus_zh: temptation to steal 连成“偷东西的诱惑”；greater than ever before 要分组读清楚。

sentences.text: A detective recently watched a well-dressed woman who always went into a large store on Monday mornings.
sentences.focus_zh: detective recently watched 先交代观察；well-dressed woman 和 Monday mornings 是人物与重复时间。

sentences.text: One Monday, there were fewer people in the shop than usual when the woman came in, so it was easier for the detective to watch her.
sentences.focus_zh: fewer people than usual 和 easier for the detective 是因果；so 前后要有自然停顿。

sentences.text: The woman first bought a few small articles.
sentences.focus_zh: first bought 引出正常购物假象；small articles 在这里是小商品，不是文章。

sentences.text: After a little time, she chose one of the most expensive dresses in the shop and handed it to an assistant who wrapped it up for her as quickly as possible.
sentences.focus_zh: 长句要分块：After a little time；one of the most expensive dresses；assistant wrapped it up；as quickly as possible。
focus_words: one of the most expensive dresses

sentences.text: Then the woman simply took the parcel and walked out of the shop without paying.
sentences.focus_zh: simply took the parcel 要读出“不做别的事”；without paying 是全句的关键。

sentences.text: The girl 'gave' her mother a free dress once a week!
sentences.focus_zh: gave 的引号有反讽；once a week 要收成最后的真相。
